name: Stitched Together

abilities.name: Demise (Haunt Dreams)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, another ally within 1" heals 1.

actions.name: Deadly Claws
actions.effects: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Rake the Eyes
triggers.text: Choose a suit. The target must reveal the top three cards of its fate deck and discard any of the chosen suit. Place the rest back on top of the deck in any order.

actions.name: Gamble Your Life
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. If this action fails, this model deals 3 irreducible damage to itself.
actions.effects: For each raise this action receives, draw a card and discard a card.

actions.name: Fiendish Gamble
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy minion only. Once per turn.
actions.effects: Until the end of this activation, this model's actions receive a (-) against the target. Then, this model moves 5" toward the target and declares a (melee) action. At the end of this activation, if the target is still in play, this model deals 4 irreducible damage to itself.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 as indicated by 'Minion (3)' in characteristics
